title: Warm Massaman British Fish Curry
description: A light and fermented British-inspired dish featuring Massaman paste, perfect for a date night. Serve in a Korean-style brass bowl over a bed of steamed vegetables.

ingredients.name: Massaman curry paste
ingredients.notes: Use a fermented version for added depth.

ingredients.name: Heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Optional, omit for a lighter version.

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Massaman curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Pour in the fish stock and bring to a simmer.
Add the cod fillets and cook until opaque and flaking apart, about 8 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream, brown sugar, and salt. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with lime juice and serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Transfer the curry to a Korean-style brass bowl and serve immediately.
